steps: 1. Enter valid username and password|2. Click Login button|3. Wait for dashboard to load
expected_result: User is redirected to main dashboard and username is visible in header

steps: 1. Enter invalid username and wrong password|2. Click Login button|3. Wait for error message
expected_result: Error message is displayed and user remains on login page

steps: 1. Type a name in the search box|2. Wait for search results to load|3. Verify at least one result appears
expected_result: Search results table is visible with at least one matching person record

steps: 1. Verify Add Group page has loaded|2. Enter 'Smoke Test Group' in the Group Name field|3. Click Save button|4. Wait for redirect or success confirmation
expected_result: New group 'Smoke Test Group' is created and user is redirected to the group view or groups list

steps: 1. Locate 'Smoke Test Group' in the groups list|2. Click on the group name to open it|3. Click the Edit button|4. Clear the Group Name field and type 'Smoke Test Group Updated'|5. Click Save button|6. Verify the updated name is shown on the page
expected_result: Group name is updated to 'Smoke Test Group Updated' and confirmed in the page title or group header

steps: 1. Locate 'Smoke Test Group Updated' in the groups list|2. Click on the group name to open it|3. Click the Edit button to enter edit mode|4. Click the Delete Group button|5. Confirm deletion in the confirmation modal dialog|6. Verify the group no longer appears in the groups list
expected_result: Group is permanently deleted and 'Smoke Test Group Updated' no longer appears in the groups list
